description: Verified local Wan2.2 I2V 14B GGUF high/low first-last-frame image-to-video workflow for macOS/MPS. Uses start and end keyframes, text prompt, GGUFLoaderKJ high/low models, LightX2V high/low LoRAs, WanFirstLastFrameToVideo, two-stage KSamplerAdvanced, CreateVideo and SaveVideo. Quantization variants should remain resource variants, not separate workflow families.
